upgrade.title: Upgrade to PhD Atlas Pro
upgrade.subtitle: Unlock 300 active application projects, Pro backup controls, recycle bin recovery, and 100 MB storage for a heavier application season.
upgrade.requestSummary: You tried to choose {requested}. Your workspace is currently capped at {limit}.
upgrade.requestSummaryGeneric: Pro keeps higher limits ready when your application workspace grows.
upgrade.applicationLimitSummary: Free accounts can create up to {limit} application projects. You are trying to add item {requested}.
upgrade.backupFrequencySummary: Free accounts can keep automatic backup turned off only. {requested} is a Pro backup frequency.
upgrade.manualBackupSummary: Manual application backups are reserved for Pro accounts.
upgrade.draftMailboxSummary: Saving unfinished emails in the draft mailbox is reserved for Pro accounts.
upgrade.teamRequestSummary: You're requesting Team plan access for your institution — teacher and student seats, plus organization oversight.
upgrade.unlimitedBackups: Manual backups and Pro automatic backup controls
upgrade.plansDesc: The interface is prepared for account opening and future billing integration.
upgrade.freeDesc: For trying PhD Atlas with a small shortlist.
upgrade.proDesc: For active application seasons with more programs and safer backups.
upgrade.proFeatureAutomation: Manual backups, recycle bin recovery, and 100 MB storage
upgrade.teamDesc: For advisors and agencies managing a roster of students, with teacher and student seats.
upgrade.introTitle: Designed for a larger application season
upgrade.introDesc: Pro keeps the workspace calm while removing the limits that slow down serious tracking.
upgrade.benefitBackupBody: Use manual backups and faster automatic backup schedules when edits are frequent.
upgrade.benefitSafetyBody: Keep more historical versions before older backups are pruned.
upgrade.benefitSeasonBody: Track as many schools and professors as your season requires.
upgrade.benefitMemberBody: The page is ready for future payment, approval, or admin activation flows.
upgrade.flowDesc: The front-end flow is reserved now; the backend payment or approval step can be attached later.
upgrade.stepRequest: Submit a Pro access request from this page.
upgrade.stepReview: An administrator reviews the account and activates the Pro plan.
upgrade.stepActivate: The locked controls unlock automatically after the next session refresh.
upgrade.mailBody: I would like to open a Pro account. Requested item: {requested}. Current limit: {limit}.
